name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE New Bucket Bag
Louise is crafted from calfskin suede to create a sleek, fluid bucket silhouette. A deep background highlights the exquisite, shiny gold Triomphe triumph logo, presenting a relaxed and casual temperament. The bag features a handle and a detachable shoulder strap, with very impressive capacity. Completely stress-free for daily commuting, business trips, and office work 🤎
Model: 116613
Color: Suede/Brown (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 24x25x16
